articles.title: ‘We’re not concerned about Boston’: Pistons’ head coach referenced Celtics amid four-game losing streak
articles.description:
Detroit's Eastern Conference lead has dwindled while Boston now has Jayson Tatum back in the lineup.

The post ‘We’re not concerned about Boston’: Pistons’ head coach referenced Celtics amid four-game losing streak appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pistons' coach downplayed concerns about the Celtics during their four-game losing streak.
Boston's Jayson Tatum has returned to the lineup, boosting team morale.
Celtics' improved performance could affect playoff standings in the Eastern Conference.
